TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Greenskin Tribes Faction.

Translations.Comment: Literal translation maintaining the fantasy wargame tone. Grünhaut is the standard German term for greenskins.
Standard compound word for Orc Warriors. Keeps the brutal and direct feel.
Schläger conveys brutality and thuggish nature, fitting for Orc brutes.
Mob works well in German and conveys the chaotic horde-like nature.
Added hyphen for clarity between weapon type and mob.
Eber is wild boar, appropriate for the savage greenskin aesthetic.
Compound word with hyphen for readability.
Streitwagen is chariot, compound with Eber for boar. Epic and warlike.
Kurzbogenschützen = shortbow archers. Added 'schützen' for clarity that these are the bow-wielding troops.
Bolzenwerfer matches the term used in UnitProps for bolt thrower weapons.
Steinschleuder for stone thrower, consistent with Dwarf artillery naming.
Classic German word for giant, fits the mythical fantasy tone.
Wyvern is kept as is - it's a fantasy creature name recognized internationally.
Direct translation, evokes the monstrous nature of the creature.
Häuptling conveys tribal leadership, Kriegs- adds the martial aspect.
Schamane is shaman, fits the tribal mysticism of goblin magic users.
Direct translation, König is king. Grand title for the faction leader.
